ModMetaData.name: Goliann Xenotype
ModMetaData.author: Sovereign
ModMetaData.description: A xenohuman race of gentle giants, the Goliann were engineered as bodyguards for the wealthy. Unconcerned with long-term survival prospects of their race, Golianns' creators left their reproductive functions atrophied for the sake of increased physical performance, making them a rare sight in the wild reaches of rimworlds. Intended to bond fellow Goliann within their VIPs security detail and no-one else, the xenotype is deeply solitary, rarely staying long in all but the most accommodating communities.
